heading: Delete a View
body:
- Select your View from the list

- Click the **Delete this View**  icon

- Click the **Delete** button.

JSON Editor

Edit the JSON (Javascript Object Notation) configuration file objects to add, create, or remove
`stores`, `databases`, or `views`

To learn more about the configuration settings of your specific Data Store
provider, see their Configuration File page:

- [Configure Atlas Data Federation to query data from S3](adf-configuration-file-aws)

- [Azure data stores](adf-configuration-file-azure)

- [Google Cloud Storage Bucket](adf-configuration-file-gcp)

- [Atlas cluster](adf-configuration-file-atlas)

- [HTTP URL](adf-configuration-file-http)

- [Online Archives](adf-configuration-file-oa)

mongosh

To learn how to set and manage storage configuration using
[MongoDB Shell (mongosh)](mongodb-shell), see the page
[view](adf-cli).
